case_title: SOLIS, FE CORAZON VS LEE, CHUN SU et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,250.00 FILED BY SOLIS, FE CORAZON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHUN SU ITALIAN FURNITURE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

CERTIFIED MAILING TO CHUN SU LEE RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOLIS, FE CORAZON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, CHUN SU ITALIAN FURNITURE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHUN SU ITALIAN FURNITURE
